content.en:
This Ancient Demon Monument is a life pattern, one of the fragments of the life pattern of ancient demon-level creatures.

The Ancient Demon Level is different from the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, after he broke through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, the Ultimate Particles will combine themselves into a new Ultimate Extreme Extreme Lifeform, in fact, the combination of those Ultimate Particles is a life pattern.

However, the life pattern of the Ultimate Extreme is very ordinary.

At this moment, after Ye Tian witnessed this ancient demon monument, he knew how amazing the life pattern of the ancient demon-level existence was.

The combination of these ultimate particles is too mysterious, in fact, every kind of life in the Abyss of Aromu has a special combination of ultimate particles in the body, so the physical bodies of these beings are extremely strong.

If Ye Tian could completely comprehend the life pattern of an ancient demon-level creature, he would be able to change his own life pattern, thereby transforming his body. "Seven, Four, Seven" Even if he returns to his own era from this era, he can also change his physical body, so that he has an ultimate supreme body comparable to that of an ancient demon-level existence.

"This is just one of the fragments of the Life Pattern of the Ancient Demon Level, and the other Ancient Demon Tablets should contain other Life Pattern Fragments. "

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he went to comprehend other ancient demon tablets.

Of course, other king-level people can also comprehend like him, but they haven't broken through to the ancient demon level, the realm is too low, the vision is too low, they don't realize the true value of these ancient demon tablets at all, they just use it to improve their ultimate rules, which is undoubtedly overkill.

For Ye Tian, these ancient demon tablets may be more important than the opportunities behind.

Therefore, he is going to spend some more time here.

Another period of time passed, Ye Tian understood the second ancient demon tablet, and then began to comprehend the third ancient demon tablet.

The Fourth Ancient Demon Monument!

The Fifth Ancient Demon Monument!

The Sixth Ancient Demon Monument!

As the years passed, more and more ancient magic tablets were comprehended by him.

At this time, there is already a king-level who has passed the first assessment, so passing the assessment is to realize a fragment of the life pattern of the ancient magic tablet, so as to draw it in the ancient magic tablet, and then an ultimate space tunnel will appear on the ancient magic tablet, and you can enter through this tunnel.

But Ye Tian naturally didn't want to go to the second assessment so soon, maybe the most precious place of this relic was here.

Therefore, he wants to understand all the ancient demon tablets here, even if he wastes time and doesn't have time to pass the second level, he won't regret it.

Crane Shadow noticed that Ye Tian changed an ancient magic monument every once in a while, and couldn't help but shake his head secretly, he originally thought that Ye Tian would be able to quickly understand the mystery of the ancient magic monument, and through this level, he didn't expect to keep changing the ancient magic monument, don't you understand?

"Forget it, I'd better concentrate on enlightenment!"

Tsurukage said darkly.

Time flies, more and more king-level people have entered the second level, and Ye Tian is still here to comprehend, not in a hurry.

Sixty Ancient Demon Monuments!

Seventy Ancient Demon Monuments!

Eighty Ancient Demon Monuments!

Ninety Ancient Demon Monuments!

And on this day, Tsurukage realized an ancient magic tablet, although it was not completely understood, but at least it could enter the second level.

At this time, he saw that Ye Tian had changed another ancient demon tablet, so he walked over and said, "God, haven't you realized an ancient demon tablet yet? It's a waste of time for you to go on like this, if you don't understand, I can mention you." "

"Patriarch, I have long realized that these ancient demon tablets contain fragments of ancient demon-level life patterns, and I want to comprehend for a while longer. "

Ye Tian said.

"You've got it!!"

Crane Shadow was shocked, saying this, Ye Tian changed the ancient magic monument again and again, not because he couldn't understand it, but because he realized it.

This is too wicked!

Seeing this, he didn't bother Ye Tian, Ye Tian had his own ideas, so he naturally wouldn't interfere.

Immediately, he entered the second level.

......

Finally this day.

Ye Tian thoroughly comprehended these one hundred and eight ancient demon tablets, and realized one hundred and eight ancient demon-level life pattern fragments.

At this moment, these ancient demon-level life pattern fragments combined together to form a complete life pattern.

Of course, this is not a life pattern suitable for his ultimate way of ten thousand laws, it is the life pattern of this ancient demon-level powerhouse Hu Yi, if he copies it, it is naturally not suitable for him, but he can understand his own life pattern from this life pattern, so as to make his own strength soar.

It's just that if you want to create your own ancient demon-level life pattern, it will take a long time, and you can't do it in a short time.......

But if it takes a period of time to change the life pattern of your body a little, you can still do it.

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he entered the second level from an ancient demon monument.

Airplanes!!!

The ultimate space tunnel crossed over, and Ye Tian came to another world.

Here, Ye Tian saw the patriarch Heying.

"Oh my God, you're finally here!"

When Heying saw Ye Tian, he hurriedly came over and said.

"Patriarch, what's going on with this second level?"

Ye Tian asked directly.

Crane Shadow introduced: "The second level is the phantom array, you see the palace in front of you, the periphery is covered with phantom arrays, and the phantom arrays are ever-changing. If you are able to crack a phantom circle, you will be rewarded with an item, but the item is random and can only be obtained one. From the second level onwards, there are substantial benefits. "

"Phantom Array!"

Ye Tian walked over and observed this illusion array.

"It's really ever-changing, and it's a constant combination of ultimate particles. "

This kind of formation, Ye Tian had never seen in his time, so it can be seen that the study of formation here is still far beyond his time.

However, no matter what the formation is, there are traces to follow, as long as you can understand the mystery, it is not difficult to crack. 0.4

"Patriarch, have you cracked it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I haven't cracked it, it's a bit difficult, but I'm a little clue at the moment, and after a long time, maybe I can hope to crack a formation, maybe if I'm lucky, I can get the reward of the top treasure!" Tsurukage said.

Immediately, Ye Tian was also here to comprehend.

Although he said that he was the Ultimate Extreme Venerable who had crossed the ages, it was the first time he had encountered this kind of phantom array composed of countless ultimate particles, and he had to start from scratch to comprehend, and it was impossible to say that he could realize it at a glance, that was too nonsense.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian continued to comprehend, and gradually understood the mystery of a phantom array, and this comprehension also improved his formation attainment.

He is not in a hurry to crack this phantom array, and continues to comprehend other phantom arrays, so as to improve his knowledge of the formation.
